facts.context: In an effort to preserve wildlife on his farm in Massachusetts, a farmer decides to stop using a 10-acre field. The farmer fences off the area, stops cutting the grass, and stops allowing livestock to graze on it. After twenty years, the area would most likely
facts.truth: be grown over with bushes and small trees.
distractors: be covered with moss and rocks.
be barren due to lack of maintenance.
